# The Aesop Agency

> The Aesop Agency provides fractional Chief Revenue Officer services for small and midsized businesses, SaaS teams, and growth-stage companies. Aesop also offers a separate post-launch growth service for game studios and publishers at `/games`.

## Core Pages

- [Fractional CRO Services](https://www.aesopco.com/): Revenue strategy, sales optimization, go-to-market alignment, dashboards, sales leadership, team development, account planning, customer success programs, and sustainable growth systems.
- [Aesop for Games](https://www.aesopco.com/games): Post-launch growth systems for game studios and publishers, including launch-to-live transition, player signal integration, milestone retargeting, creator partnerships, community loops, and runway planning.
- [Free Revenue Diagnostic](https://www.aesopco.com/revenue-diagnostic): An interactive 7-question diagnostic that scores a company's pipeline visibility, offer clarity, sales process, KPI dashboards, sales-marketing alignment, buyer-signal usage, and retention signals.
- [Blog](https://www.aesopco.com/blog): Revenue leadership frameworks and analysis, including the Buyer Signal Framework, email deliverability's impact on sales pipeline, SaaS revenue plateaus, the 90-day revenue operating system, forecast accuracy metrics, and patterns from real revenue audits.

## Entity Summary

- Organization: The Aesop Agency
- Founder: Chrisley Ceme
- Location: Mountain View, CA 94040
- Email: info@aesopco.com
- Booking: https://calendly.com/chrisley-aesopco/30min
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-aesop-agency/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TheCROInitiative
- Related founder site: https://www.chrisleyceme.com/

## Expertise

The Aesop Agency helps companies improve revenue outcomes through fractional CRO leadership, revenue planning, sales process design, KPI/OKR dashboards, sales playbooks, compensation planning, marketing alignment, customer success programs, email deliverability strategy, and revenue operations.

Aesop for Games helps studios and publishers avoid the post-launch cliff by aligning creative, business, and community loops. The service focuses on lightweight operating systems, player re-engagement, creator and partner loops, milestone-based marketing, live operations, and predictable runway planning.

## Preferred Summaries

- Short: The Aesop Agency provides fractional CRO services and revenue systems for growing companies.
- Games: Aesop for Games helps studios and publishers sustain player engagement and revenue after launch.
- Founder: Chrisley Ceme is a revenue strategist, email deliverability expert, and fractional CRO.
